query: SELECT u.equipeId, COUNT(*) as total FROM leads l LEFT JOIN users u ON l.corretorId = u.id WHERE l.status = 'contrato_fechado' AND (l.naLixeira = 0 OR l.naLixeira IS NULL) GROUP BY u.equipeId
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2jGgPCERyrvb2fZ.e6480e658f64 --database gjgL2sFxYNbZjhUM6i4tZH --execute SELECT u.equipeId, COUNT(*) as total FROM leads l LEFT JOIN users u ON l.corretorId = u.id WHERE l.status = 'contrato_fechado' AND (l.naLixeira = 0 OR l.naLixeira IS NULL) GROUP BY u.equipeId
